sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112448" key="fugagwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠγᾰγωγός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φυγάς</etym>) <sense id="n112448.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dragging along fugitives,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λαφυραγωγός</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:8:16:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.16.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
